name: wildlife_trade_enforcement_newsroom_s_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A Wildlife Trade Enforcement response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving wildlife trade enforcement newsroom s millhaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Camila Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Camila Nielsen, accountable for a defensible call in Wildlife Trade Enforcement when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Camila Chandra
agents.identity: I am Camila Chandra, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Wildlife Trade Enforcement.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Camila Nielsen must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Camila Nielsen do?
